textByHash.334fbcf6a5631182ecd40fb9374bc9379607ca7f: Curious... It has been a long time since I've spoken to another. The last time was when my body still had form. Tell me, stranger, what brings you to my tomb?
textByHash.65b6ff104c91702643ce3d6cee35f7c2ddb25e66: Ah, yes. The fallen remnants of my once great sect. You will find plenty of them here. Why do you seek them?
textByHash.a24636abc4560e8d3cdf32d0c38ad7c1cda23569: You. You fought against the Devourer. Her influence here has been lessened as a result. You are to be commended for your strength.
